prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类最低录取位次分别为约2951名、3822名、2765名、3372名、3867名。整体呈波动上行趋势，近两年从2765名后移至3867名，累计后移约1102名 ，2025年基准位次约3867名；该校在福建省物理类招生计划2021年43人、2022年44人、2023年45人、2024年46人、2025年55人，呈逐年递增态势；但2026年招生 计划显示为45人，较2025年减少10人，缩招约18.2%，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华东师范大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2 026年位列第29名，属于全国顶尖师范类高校，办学层次极高；该校近年声誉整体平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度总排名第28位（较热） ，2024年曾升至第3位（高热），短视频平台关注度持续较高，反映报考热度不低；第五轮学科评估中，教育学、体育学、统计学获评A+，中国语言文学、世界 史、地理学、心理学、数学、生态学、软件工程获评A，外国语言文学、物理学、生物学、马克思主义理论获评A-，共14个学科达A-及以上，学科实力雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐；师范/教育类呈分化观望但整体偏热。福建省2026年普通高考总人数约267900人，较2025年（约252348人）增 加约6.2%，物理类考生估算约20万人，同比增加约4.5%，整体竞争加剧。2025年物理类本科批441分，近年波动不大；华东师范大学位于上海，属 一线城市，对福建省考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在福建省物理类招生规模适中，2025年招生55人占比较往年有所提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3867名、2026年 计划缩招18.2%、福建省物理类考生增加约4.5%以及学校声誉热度偏高等因素，缩招带来的位次前移效应大于考生增加的后移效应，但学校高层次的吸引力与抖 音热度对报考的拉动作用不可忽视。经综合权衡，预测2026年物理类最低录取位次约3495名，区间2997-3993名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Physics Category were approximately 2951, 3822, 2765, 3372, and 3867 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating upward trend. In the past two years, the ranking shifted from 2765 to 3867, a cumulative backward shift of about 1102 positions. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3867. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province was 43 in 2021, 44 in 2022, 45 in 2023, 46 in 2024, and 55 in 2025, showing a year-on-year increase. However, the 2026 enrollment plan shows 45 students, a decrease of 10 from 2025, a reduction of about 18.2%, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranked 29th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top-tier normal universities in China with an extremely high academic level. In recent years, its reputation has been generally stable, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranks 28th overall (relatively hot), and in 2024 it rose to 3rd (very hot), indicating sustained high attention on short video platforms, reflecting considerable application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Education, Sports Science, and Statistics were rated A+, Chinese Language and Literature, World History, Geography, Psychology, Mathematics, Ecology, and Software Engineering were rated A, and Foreign Language and Literature, Physics, Biology, and Marxist Theory were rated A-, totaling 14 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended. Normal/Education majors show differentiation and wait-and-see but are generally hot. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Fujian Province is about 267,900, an increase of about 6.2% from 2025 (about 252,348). Physics Category examinees are estimated at about 200,000, a year-on-year increase of about 4.5%, intensifying overall competition. The 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 441 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional appeal to Fujian Province examinees. Its enrollment scale for Physics Category in Fujian Province is moderate, with 55 students in 2025 accounting for a higher proportion compared to previous years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3867, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 18.2%, the increase in Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province by about 4.5%, and the high reputation and popularity of the university, the forward shift effect of enrollment reduction is greater than the backward shift effect of increased examinees. However, the university's high-level appeal and Douyin popularity's driving effect on applications cannot be ignored. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 3495, with a range of 2997-3993.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 3495, with a range of 2997-3993. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle segment (within about 3200) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Software Engineering, Statistics, and Computer Science and Technology. Candidates with rankings in the middle segment (around 3500) should target Tier 2 majors like Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Microelectronics, and Communication Engineering as their main direction. Candidates with rankings in the lower segment (after about 3800) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also considering double degree programs to enhance cost-effectiveness.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for History Category were approximately 443, 564, 855, 531, and 700 respectively. Overall, there is significant fluctuation, with a backward shift to 855 in 2023, a rebound to 531 in 2024, and a further backward shift to 700 in 2025, showing a recent trend of moving backward. The enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province was 24 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 22 in 2024, and 20 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend in recent years. However, the 2026 enrollment plan shows 23 students, an increase of 3 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 15%, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 29th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top universities in China, with a strong appeal to liberal arts candidates. In recent years, its reputation has remained stable, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranks 28th overall (relatively hot), and it rose to 3rd in 2024 (very hot), with consistently high attention on short video platforms, reflecting a high level of application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Education, Sports Science, and Statistics were rated A+, while Chinese Language and Literature (A), World History (A), Psychology (A), and Geography (A) are highly matched with History Category enrollment majors, demonstrating outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Literature majors are socially recommended as relatively hot, Law as relatively hot, and Teacher Training/Education majors are polarized but overall stable. In 2026, the total number of Fujian Province general college entrance examination takers is approximately 267,900, with an estimated 64,000 History Category candidates, an increase of about 6.3% year-on-year, intensifying competition. The 2025 History Category undergraduate batch cutoff is 450 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong regional appeal to liberal arts candidates in Fujian Province. The History Category enrollment scale is small (20-27 students), and even with an expansion of 3 students, it remains a scarce quota, leading to fierce competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 700, the 2026 plan expansion of 15%, the increase in Fujian History Category candidates by about 6.3%, and the sustained high-level appeal of the school, both expansion and candidate increase push the ranking number higher. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking for History Category is approximately 793, with a range of 680-906.
